cards.title: The Messenger
cards.meaning: A signal is in transit. Something you have been waiting to hear is already on its way. Stay receptive — the channel is open.

cards.title: The Mirror
cards.phrase: What you see is what is seeing.
cards.meaning: The situation reflects something interior. Look past the surface event to what it is showing you about yourself.

cards.title: The Threshold
cards.meaning: A crossing is underway. Hesitation now costs more than it saves. The door is open; trust your original impulse.

cards.title: The Spread
cards.meaning: A full opening. All positions are in play.

cards.title: The Current
cards.meaning: The pattern beneath the immediate event. Step back and read the larger current you are moving through.

cards.title: The Field
cards.phrase: Context is not background — it is ground.
cards.meaning: The conditions surrounding this moment. What has accumulated to make this possible, or difficult.

cards.title: The Witness
cards.meaning: There is a vantage point available to you. Rise to it. From here the shape of events becomes visible.

cards.title: The Root
cards.meaning: The structural condition beneath everything else. This is not about the immediate situation — it is about what makes the situation possible at all.

cards.title: The Long Arc
cards.phrase: You are further along than you think.
cards.meaning: Seen from the longest view, this moment is a confirmation, not a crisis. Trust the trajectory.

cards.title: The Unnamed
cards.meaning: There is something at work here that cannot yet be named. Hold it without forcing definition. It will make itself known.
